title: Finalize Order
description: Confirm customer information, validate prescription values, and authorize payment for the current optical build.
step1.title: Client Details
step1.description: Identity and delivery fields are required for the existing checkout request.
step2.title: Prescription Details
step2.fromConfigLab: Prescription loaded from Config Lab. Values are pre-filled.
step2.defaultDescription: All values remain mapped to the current backend order contract.
step3.title: Payment Method
step3.description: Please select your preferred secure payment channel: WeChat Pay or Alipay.
manifest.title: Manifest
manifest.couponError: Invalid promo code or minimum spend not met
manifest.nearlyComplete: Client and payment selections are nearly complete.
manifest.stillInProgress: Client and payment selections are still in progress.
selectProductError: Select a product before submitting checkout.
prescriptionNumberError: Prescription values must all be valid numbers.
sessionExpired: Your session expired before checkout completed. Sign in again to submit this order.
manifest.noProductSelected: No product selected. Return to the
manifest.collectionLink: collection and choose a frame first.

HIGH_INDEX_174.label: Custom Lenses (High-Index)
HIGH_INDEX_174.description: Thin 1.74 index lenses for stronger prescriptions.

AR_ONYX.label: Onyx AR Coating
AR_ONYX.description: Premium anti-reflective coating for glare reduction.

HEV_BLUE.label: HEV Filter
HEV_BLUE.description: Blue light filtering treatment for daily screen use.

cashier.scanInstructions: Please scan the QR code with WeChat to complete payment
cashier.devDescription: You do not need to scan the QR code with real money. Click the button below to send a signed Webhook payload to the backend to set the order status to PAID and trigger notification emails.
cashier.paymentSuccessDesc: We have received your payment. Your order has been dispatched to our optical lab for configuration, and a confirmation email has been sent to your registered address.
